Key Finding: Retention Strength Score ranges from 0 to 100, with an average score of 57.63.

Key Finding: Engagement status combined with retention strength helps identify high-risk customer pockets that are not visible from engagement alone.

Key Finding: High Product Load combined with Critical Retention Risk shows the highest churn exposure within product-depth segments.

Key Finding: At-Risk Premium is the largest customer risk segment, representing 34.52% of the customer base.

Key Finding: High Product Load Risk has the highest churn rate at 79.67%, making it a priority monitoring segment.

Key Finding: The customer risk mix shows that At-Risk Premium is the largest segment by customer volume.
